positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a rising sun over stylized mountain peaks. The style is modern linocut art, combining strong graphic shapes with organic flow. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and charcoal gray, emphasizing negative space and bold silhouettes. The composition should be perfectly centered, creating a dramatic, high-contrast emblem suitable for chest placement on clothing. Focus on clean, crisp lines and a bold, symmetrical arrangement of shapes. Graphic design elements, vector style, symmetrical composition, woodcut print aesthetic, crisp edges, central focus.
negative: blurry, noisy, low-detail, text, watermarks, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, grainy, photographic, realistic, cartoon, childish, asymmetrical, excessive colors
